title: berlandiera × humilis
intro: Berlandiera × humilis, also known as Chocolate Flower, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Berlandiera lyrata and Berlandiera gracilis, both native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Berlandiera × humilis include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Berlandiera × humilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
